title: Administration
subtitle: Tenant-wide administration. CFO and Senior Accountants edit; Owner has read access plus billing control; Junior has no access.
readonly_banner: You have read access to Administration. Editing requires CFO or Senior Accountant role.
no_access_description: This surface is for CFO, Senior Accountant, and Owner roles. Speak to your CFO if you need to change team access or tenant configuration.

flags.title: Tenant Flags
flags.description: Turn major product surfaces on or off for this tenant. Flags are tenant-wide and affect every user's navigation until changed.
flags.owner_readonly_note: Owner is read-only on tenant flags. Ask the CFO to change these.
flags.backend_pending_note: Backend endpoint is not yet live — changes are persisted locally until the API ships. Flag this commit for review.

has_foreign_activity.label: Foreign activity
has_foreign_activity.description: Enable when the company has cross-border income, expenses, or tax obligations. Adds Withholding Tax, CIT Assessments, Tax Lodgements, and Disallowance Rules to the Setup nav.

team.title: Team Access
team.description: Manage users, their roles, and per-screen access. Role enforcement is authoritative on the backend — UI only reflects it.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Tenant-wide connections to banks, ERPs, and third-party tools.

security.title: Tenant Security
security.description: Organization-wide password policy, SSO, IP allowlist, and session duration.
security.coming_soon: Tenant-level security controls will land with the SSO + policy backend.

audit_log.title: Full Audit Log
audit_log.description: Every admin-relevant action across the tenant. For personal activity, see Settings → My Activity.
audit_log.empty: No admin events in this range.

billing.title: Billing & Subscription
billing.description: Plan, seat count, invoices, and payment method. Owner-only.
billing.owner_only_note: Only the Owner can manage billing. CFO and Senior Accountants see a read-only summary.
billing.coming_soon: Billing surface ships with the subscription + payments backend.
